title: Spatial ECM-omics via MALDI-MS Imaging
author: Brittney Gorman
materials: High pH tissue buffer (TRIS 10 mM pH 9)
Low pH tissue clearing buffer (Citra Buffer)

steps.title: Remove Matrix in 50 % ACN for 1 min
steps.instruction: Remove Matrix in 50 % ACN for 1 min

steps.title: Submerge in High pH tissue buffer...
steps.instruction: Submerge in High pH tissue buffer (TRIS 10 mM pH 9) for 1 min

steps.title: Submerge in water for 1 min
steps.instruction: Submerge in water for 1 min

steps.title: Submerge in Low pH tissue clearing...
steps.instruction: Submerge in Low pH tissue clearing buffer (Citra Buffer) for 1 min

steps.title: Submerge in water for H 2 O 1 min
steps.instruction: Submerge in water for H 2 O 1 min

steps.title: Prepare TRIS Buffer at 10mM pH 9 For 500 mL
steps.instruction: Prepare TRIS Buffer at 10mM pH 9 For 500 mL: 0.6 g Trizma base MilliporeSigma Catalog #T8937 . Adjust pH with NaOH and HCl

steps.title: Add ~ 10 ml of the...
steps.instruction: Add ~ 10 ml of the buffer to a 5-slide mailer with side opening

steps.title: Place no more than 3 slides...
steps.instruction: Place no more than 3 slides per 5-slide mailer with side opening. Slides should be placed with tissue facing inward to the solution in positions 1 and 5, NOT facing the slide mailer walls. Position 3 may face either way

steps.title: Completely fill the slide mailer the...
steps.instruction: Completely fill the slide mailer the rest of the way with buffer

steps.title: Maintain “cook” option for 30 min
steps.instruction: Maintain “cook” option for 30 min

steps.title: Cool the slides after antigen retrieval:
steps.instruction: Cool the slides after antigen retrieval:

steps.title: Remove mailer and place in a...
steps.instruction: Remove mailer and place in a tub with cool water from the faucet. Water should not go over the top of the mailer

steps.title: Allow to cool for 3 min
steps.instruction: Allow to cool for 3 min

steps.title: Remove half the buffer from the...
steps.instruction: Remove half the buffer from the mailer and replace with distilled water

steps.title: Repeat 2x
steps.instruction: Repeat 2x

steps.title: Complete by rinsing in 100% distilled water
steps.instruction: Complete by rinsing in 100% distilled water

steps.title: Dry the slides 5 min in the desiccator
steps.instruction: Dry the slides 5 min in the desiccator

steps.title: Spray the Collagenase III solution:
steps.instruction: Spray the Collagenase III solution:

steps.title: Wash syringe and lines
steps.instruction: Wash syringe and lines

steps.title: Wash syringe lines with 0
steps.instruction: Wash syringe lines with 0.1% TFA (5 min at 55 µl/min)

steps.title: Wash syringe lines with H2O (5 min at 55 µl/min)
steps.instruction: Wash syringe lines with H2O (5 min at 55 µl/min)

steps.title: Using the syringe dedicated to Collagenase...
steps.instruction: Using the syringe dedicated to Collagenase III enzyme solution, rinse the syringe with water by screwing in the needle tip, filling with 3 or more ml of water, and aspirating into waste

steps.title: Fill with Collagenase III solution ensuring...
steps.instruction: Fill with Collagenase III solution ensuring that there are no bubbles in syringe. Tip: After loading all the Collagenase III solution required, pull a small volume of air into the syringe. Gently dispense the syringe until the large air bubble is gone.

steps.title: Place the samples in the matrix sprayer (e
steps.instruction: Place the samples in the matrix sprayer (e.g., TM or M3-Sprayer) tray, fastening them with tape.

steps.title: Program the TM-Sprayer™ method for COL3...
steps.instruction: Program the TM-Sprayer™ method for COL3 to use 45 °C, 15 passes, 25 µl/min, crisscross pattern, velocity of 1200 mm/min, 3 mm track spacing, and a dry time of zero. The tip of the spray head should be 50 mm from the slide’s surface.

steps.title: Remove the needle tip and fasten...
steps.instruction: Remove the needle tip and fasten the syringe to the TM-Sprayer line used for Collagenase III. Place the syringe onto the red syringe pump. Ensure that the rate is set at 25 µl/min.

steps.title: Use a dummy slide to check...
steps.instruction: Use a dummy slide to check the TM-Sprayer nozzle for spraying of solution. It generally takes about 2-3 min (200 µL) to start spraying.

steps.title: Once moisture is detected on the...
steps.instruction: Once moisture is detected on the dummy slide, press Start on the M3-Sprayer. Collagenase III solution will be applied in a thin layer onto target tissue.

steps.title: To prevent liquid from evaporating too...
steps.instruction: To prevent liquid from evaporating too fast and the enzyme from becoming inactive, a wet atmosphere is maintained by placing the ITO slide into a sealed incubation chamber filled with 150 ml saturated KNO3 solution and pre-incubated at 37.5 °C.

steps.title: After application of Collagenase III onto...
steps.instruction: After application of Collagenase III onto the slide, place it on top of a 50 ml glass beaker in the incubation chamber.

steps.title: Incubate 5 hrs at 37
steps.instruction: Incubate 5 hrs at 37.5 C

steps.title: After incubation, remove the slide from...
steps.instruction: After incubation, remove the slide from the incubation chamber and let dry in the desiccator

steps.title: Prepare CHCA matrix at 7 mg/ml...
steps.instruction: Prepare CHCA matrix at 7 mg/ml in 50% ACN/ 1% TFA/ 10mM monobasic ammonium phosphate

steps.title: Spray the CHCA Matrix:
steps.instruction: Spray the CHCA Matrix:

steps.title: Set up TM-Sprayer referring to the guide for the TM-Sprayer
steps.instruction: Set up TM-Sprayer referring to the guide for the TM-Sprayer. Temperature should be set to 79°C with 12 passes, velocity of 1300, and 2.5 mm offset.

steps.title: Put the slide in the MALDI...
steps.instruction: Put the slide in the MALDI holder and load it in the timsTOF flex. Adjust the pressure in the TIMS to ~ 1.8 mBar by turning the knob above the syringe pump.

steps.title: Perform N-glycan preparation and imaging according to the protocol dx
steps.instruction: Perform N-glycan preparation and imaging according to the protocol dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8epv5j1m4l1b/v4 Spatial N-glycomics with MALDI-MSI for human kidney tissue by Christopher R Anderton

steps.title: Vortex briefly and sonicate 15 min
steps.instruction: Vortex briefly and sonicate 15 min

steps.title: Load the method for ECM analysis
steps.instruction: Load the method for ECM analysis. Parameters of the method Scan range: 700 - 3000 m/z; Ion polarity: Positive; 400 shots at 10,000 Hz; and tune parameters as displayed. Tune parameters for the timsTOF fleX ECMomics method

steps.title: Select the measurement regions in FlexImaging
steps.instruction: Select the measurement regions in FlexImaging

steps.title: Calibrate the method in ESI mode...
steps.instruction: Calibrate the method in ESI mode while infusing Agilent Tune Mix: G1969-85000 Contributed by users Catalog #G1969-85000

steps.title: Start Acquisition through FlexImaging
steps.instruction: Start Acquisition through FlexImaging
